name: telar
description: A minimal-computing framework for weaving IIIF images, audio, video, and texts into layered visual narratives.
author: The Telar authors

scripts.build:js: esbuild assets/js/telar-story/main.js --bundle --outfile=assets/js/telar-story.js --format=iife --sourcemap --banner:js="/* GENERATED FILE - do not edit. Bundled from assets/js/telar-story/ by esbuild. Rebuild: npm run build:js (see assets/js/README.md). */"
